name: io.github.boyddriesen/sharpspring-mcp-server
description: Open-source MCP server for the SharpSpring API (Constant Contact Lead Gen & CRM). Read/write Leads, discover custom fields, and call any standard SharpSpring API method.

environmentVariables.name: SHARPSPRING_ACCOUNT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your SharpSpring account ID, generated under API Keys in your SharpSpring account.

environmentVariables.name: SHARPSPRING_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your SharpSpring secret key, generated under API Keys in your SharpSpring account.

environmentVariables.name: SHARPSPRING_API_VERSION
environmentVariables.description: Optional. SharpSpring API version to use: v1.2 (UTC timestamps, default) or v1 (timestamps follow the account's Company Profile timezone).
